basic_details.job_title: NIT Delhi Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Assistant Professor Posts
basic_details.short_information: The National Institute of Technology Delhi (NIT Delhi) has officially announced the Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 with 7 openings. The detailed notification has been published on the official NIT Delhi website. Candidates holding B.E./ B.Tech. and/ or M.E./ M.Tech. or equivalent in the relevant discipline along with a Ph.D. in the relevant area are eligible to attend the walk-in interview from 20-07-2026 to 23-07-2026. Direct links to download the official notification and walk-in interview details are shared below.

content_sections.heading: NIT Delhi Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the NIT Delhi Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download NIT Delhi Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.event: Walk-in Interview (Aerospace Engineering and Mechanical Engineering)

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for NIT Delhi Various Posts Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for NIT Delhi Assistant Professor posts?
faq.answer: The walk-in interviews are scheduled from July 20, 2026, to July 23, 2026, depending on the engineering discipline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Assistant Professor position?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.E./B.Tech. and/or M.E./M.Tech or equivalent degree along with a Ph.D. in the relevant area.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for Assistant Professor posts at NIT Delhi?
faq.answer: There are a total of 7 vacancies for the Assistant Professor positions across various engineering departments.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application fee for the NIT Delhi Assistant Professor recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Assistant Professor role?
faq.answer: The salary ranges from ₹70,000/- to ₹80,000/- per month, with higher pay for candidates awarded with a Ph.D.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for these positions?
faq.answer: The selection process involves Document Verification followed by a Walk-in Interview.

faq.question: Q7. Where is the walk-in interview venue?
faq.answer: The walk-in interviews will be held at the NIT Delhi office.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should candidates bring for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must bring all original documents and one set of self-attested photocopies, including ID proof, educational certificates, and experience certificates if applicable.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a contractual or permanent position?
faq.answer: The job type for these Assistant Professor posts is contractual.

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is 08/2026.
